items.caption: A collage of four separate photographs related to industrial equipment and processes. in the top left, there is a canister labeled "compressibility," which is a term explaining how gas particles can be compressed. adjacent to it, in the top right, is a blue industrial air compressor. below the compressor, in the bottom left, there is an industrial facility with tall towers and a clear sky. lastly, in the bottom right, there is a green cart filled with large industrial cylinders, likely containing compressed gases. the overall theme of the collage seems to be related to industrial gas handling and compression.
